text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A magazine nominates Sakura Bakushin O as "The
People's Favorite Sprinter." As she intends to run
in the Classic Triple Crown, she is less than
pleased.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this stage, stepping away from sprints would
net her little results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I decide that based on the results at the Spring
Stakes, she can spend the year running many
sprints, taking advantage of her forte in speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O, struck by my passionate
words, displays a greater interest towards the
Spring Stakes.
